title: calea rugosa
intro: Calea rugosa, also known as Mexican dagga or goat's grass, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its sedative and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help alleviate anxiety, insomnia, and pain. The health benefits of Calea rugosa include reducing stress and promoting relaxation, as well as treating digestive issues and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Calea rugosa can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
